blended.narrative: Blacktail Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,120 ft. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Sunday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 6.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 37".
